CIPHER.1144.cipherString: Approach the game with no preset agendas and you'll probably come away surprised at your overall efforts.
CIPHER.1144.question: A message by Phil Jackson encrypted with the Aristocrat Cipher has been received. What does it say?
CIPHER.1144.author: Phil Jackson

CIPHER.1145.cipherString: Art is dangerous. It is one of the attractions: when it ceases to be dangerous you don't want it.
CIPHER.1145.question: You found this coded quote by Duke Ellington, written in an Atbash cipher, on the back of a painting at your local museum. What does it say?
CIPHER.1145.author: Duke Ellington

CIPHER.1146.cipherString: It's hard to believe there are people that don't read books. There's so much magic in words and well-told stories.
CIPHER.1146.question: A note falls out of a borrowed library book. The message is a quote by C. Toni Graham, written as an Aristocrat Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1146.author: C. Toni Graham

CIPHER.1147.cipherString: Few things are harder to put up with than the annoyance of a good example.
CIPHER.1147.question: A famous phrase by Mark Twain (Samuel Langhorne Clemens) has been encoded as a Porta cipher using a keyword of FRANKLY. What does it say?
CIPHER.1147.author: Mark Twain (Samuel Langhorne Clemens)

CIPHER.1148.cipherString: The only way to keep your health is to eat what you don't want.
CIPHER.1148.question: A mysterious QR code on the back of a cereal box leads to this encrypted quote using the Nihilist Substitution Cipher with a keyword of FEASTS and polybius key of SUMPTUOUSNESS. What does it say?

CIPHER.1149.cipherString: I don't want to look dumb in front of the aliens.
CIPHER.1149.question: The message below was intercepted from an experimental satellite transmission. It contains a quote by Andy Weir, encoded as a Baconian. What does it say?
CIPHER.1149.author: Andy Weir

CIPHER.1150.cipherString: Golf is a game in which one endeavors to control a ball with implements ill adapted for the purpose.
CIPHER.1150.question: A quote by Woodrow Wilson has been encoded using the Caesar Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1150.author: Woodrow Wilson

CIPHER.1151.cipherString: What is a weed? A plant whose virtues have yet to be discovered.
CIPHER.1151.question: The message below was encoded into the DNA sequence of a synthetic organism. It translates to a quote by Ralph Waldo Emerson, encrypted using a Nihilist Substitution Cipher with a keyword length of 5. The deciphered text ends with BEDISCOVERED. What does it say?
CIPHER.1151.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

CIPHER.1152.cipherString: Always focus on the front windshield and not the rear view mirror.
CIPHER.1152.question: Colin Powell has been heard to say the following phrase that has been encoded using the Fractionated Morse Cipher. You are told that the quote has FOCUS in it corresponding to the encoded text R J M U J E R D, meaning D = ●××; E = ●●–; J = –●×; M = –––; R = ×●●; U = ×–●. What does it say?
CIPHER.1152.author: Colin Powell

CIPHER.1153.cipherString: In a gentle way, you can shake the world.
CIPHER.1153.question: Solve this quote by Mahatma Gandhi that has been encoded using the Baconian Cipher. You are told that the cipher text LEMON JUICE FEAST FIRST decodes to be WAYY. What does it say?
CIPHER.1153.author: Mahatma Gandhi

CIPHER.1154.cipherString: Yo prefiero las comedias; él es un aficionado de las películas de ciencia ficción. Hacemos turnos para elegir la película.
CIPHER.1154.question: Here is a Spanish-language quote about navigating differences that has been encrypted as a K1 Xenocrypt for you to decode.

CIPHER.1155.cipherString: I just want to keep writing music.
CIPHER.1155.question: You found a broken vinyl record when cleaning out the attic. When you reassemble the pieces, you notice this coded quote by Lady Gaga, written as an Affine cipher with a=15 and b=2. What does it say?
CIPHER.1155.author: Lady Gaga

CIPHER.1156.cipherString: Playing it safe is the riskiest choice we can ever make.
CIPHER.1156.question: The janitor found this strange paper strip under a Bunsen burner. It's a quote by Sarah Ban Breathnach, encoded with a Baconian Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1156.author: Sarah Ban Breathnach

CIPHER.1157.cipherString: I closed my eyes and found the interior rooms of my head quite thoroughly deserted.
CIPHER.1157.question: You notice the following letters spray-painted on the walls of an abandoned building. It's a quote by Daniel Quinn written in a Checkerboard cipher with a Polybius key of NIGHTMARISH. What does it say?
CIPHER.1157.author: Daniel Quinn

CIPHER.1158.cipherString: The obvious mathematical breakthrough would be development of an easy way to factor large prime numbers.
CIPHER.1158.question: This string of symbols appears on the display of a malfunctioning calculator. It hides a quote by Bill Gates, encoded as an Aristocrat. You are told that it contains the word TO. What does it say?
CIPHER.1158.author: Bill Gates

CIPHER.1159.question: A weathered note is found inside an old science textbook. The writing appears to be a quote encoded as a Cryptarithm. What do the values 68974 62075 03427 decode to?

CIPHER.1160.cipherString: Life is like a camera. Focus on what's important and capture the good times.
CIPHER.1160.question: A mysterious postcard arrives from an unknown sender. It contains a coded quote by Pep Talk Radio, written in an Atbash. What does it say?
CIPHER.1160.author: Pep Talk Radio

CIPHER.1161.cipherString: To fix hearts one must know one's own.
CIPHER.1161.question: Will Advise was often heard to say the following phrase which has been encoded as an Affine. You are told that the deciphered text starts with TO. What does it say?
CIPHER.1161.author: Will Advise

CIPHER.1162.cipherString: It pays to know the enemy - not least because at some time you may have the opportunity to turn him into a friend.
CIPHER.1162.question: You open a forgotten email draft saved in the school's computer system. It holds a quote by Margaret Thatcher encoded as a Caesar cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1162.author: Margaret Thatcher

CIPHER.1163.cipherString: Las coordinadas del mapa apuntaban directo a unas montañas, lejos del pueblo. Ella preparó su mochila y partió en secreto.
CIPHER.1163.question: This is from a Spanish-language short story about a treasure-seeker's adventure. It has been encoded as a K1 Xenocrypt for you to decode.

CIPHER.1164.question: Scrawled in dry-erase marker on the whiteboard after hours: this Cryptarithm encoded quote. What do the values 745502 05 08608 decode to?

CIPHER.1165.cipherString: Sometimes in life, you have to take difficult steps and make tough decisions, in order to achieve something extraordinary.
CIPHER.1165.question: You saw this message printed on a hot-air balloon. Decode the Patristocrat version of Saad Salman's famous advice for success, using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains TOUGH corresponding with the ciphertext letters RNPYZ on the second line. What does it say?
CIPHER.1165.author: Saad Salman

CIPHER.1166.cipherString: I'm pretty good at gardening. It consumes my time, and it feels like I'm doing something constructive.
CIPHER.1166.question: Someone left a paper with the message below on the copy machine in the office. It's a quote by Simon Baker, encoded as a Complete Columnar. The quote has FEELS somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.1166.author: Simon Baker

CIPHER.1167.cipherString: I wasn't one of the cool kids by any stretch. I just bumbled along really.
CIPHER.1167.question: The following quote by Matthew Rhys needs to be decoded with the Porta Cipher. The 47th through 51st cipher characters (VSDHW) decode to be ALONG. What does it say?
CIPHER.1167.author: Matthew Rhys

CIPHER.1168.cipherString: Children take joy in their work and sometimes as adults we forget that's something we should continue doing.
CIPHER.1168.question: You find this encoded quote written inside the cover of a chemistry reference book. It's attributed to Ashley Ormon, encoded as an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.1168.author: Ashley Ormon

CIPHER.1169.cipherString: I tell them that being honest is important. I have also taught them to be hard-working because the world is so cruel to lazy people.
CIPHER.1169.question: You stumble across this encoded text on an old floppy disk labeled “Project Discovery.” It's a quote by Joy Kwesiga describing her values, encoded as a Patristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher's third word is THEM. What does it say?
CIPHER.1169.author: Joy Kwesiga

CIPHER.1170.cipherString: Discipline is giving yourself a command and following it up with action
CIPHER.1170.question: Someone taped a piece of paper with this sequence onto the back of a trophy from last year's Science Olympiad. It's a quote by Bob Proctor, written using a Checkerboard Cipher. The deciphered text starts with DISCIPLINE. What does it say?
CIPHER.1170.author: Bob Proctor

CIPHER.1171.cipherString: The use of gloves as a fashion accessory appears to have begun in Europe around the thirteenth century.
CIPHER.1171.question: A time-capsule USB drive from 1983 just auto-opened with this Aristocrat-encrypted message. You are told that the cipher contains OF. What does it say?

CIPHER.1172.cipherString: Speak your dreams, no one climbs a mountain accidentally.
CIPHER.1172.question: You discover a scrap of paper tucked inside an old lab notebook. It contains a quote by Kent Thiry encoded as a Fractionated Morse. You are told that the quote has S A MO in it corresponding to the encoded text R G D W W O, meaning D = ●–×; G = ●××; O = –×●; R = ×●●; W = ×––. You are also told that B = ●×●. What does it say?
CIPHER.1172.author: Kent Thiry

CIPHER.1173.cipherString: Perhaps more than any other, the food industry is very sensitive to consumer demand.
CIPHER.1173.question: A coded message is discovered inside a fortune cookie. It turns out to be a quote by Michael Pollan, encoded using a Complete Columnar Cipher. The quote has THE FOOD somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.1173.author: Michael Pollan
